info.title: VRC API
info.description:
THIS PAGE IS OUT OF DATE!!! DON'T USE RN!!!!!
VRC API for accessing movies and media content through VRChat URLs.

**Important Notes:**
- This API is under development
- Please reach out before using this API
- VRCUrls are immutable and you must create a pool of 10,000 VRCUrls that the server will use (you can do so using nya.llc/vrc/gen)
- All resources in search results are substituted by integer corresponding to VRCUrl array positions

get.description:
Retrieve a VRCUrl redirect for a specific pool and index.
Response may be:
- 302 redirect to video URL
- Additional data for a route
- "404 not found" video

parameters.name: pool
parameters.description: Must be same as pool param used in search endpoint

302.description: Redirect to video URL or resource

get.description: Get movies for a search query using VRCUrl pool system

parameters.name: pool
parameters.description: Unique ID for your VRCUrl pool, only letters numbers hyphens or underscores

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Search query with special formatting. All characters up to and including the unicode character '→' are ignored, then whitespace is trimmed.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query with no special interpretation

results.title: Spider-Man
results.overview: After being bitten by a genetically altered spider at Oscorp, nerdy but endearing high school student Peter Parker is endowed with amazing powers to become the superhero known as Spider-Man.

400.description: Bad request - missing required parameters or invalid pool format

get.description: Gets the top rated movies. Identical to search endpoint but without input parameter.

parameters.name: pool
parameters.description: Unique ID for your VRCUrl pool, only letters numbers hyphens or underscores

200.description: Successful response with top rated movies

400.description: Bad request - missing required parameters or invalid pool format

overview.example: After being bitten by a genetically altered spider at Oscorp, nerdy but endearing high school student Peter Parker is endowed with amazing powers to become the superhero known as Spider-Man.

vrcurl.description: Index of VRCUrl that will redirect to the movie file, or a 404 video if not found

PoolParameter.name: pool
PoolParameter.description: Unique ID for your VRCUrl pool
